checklist.description: When both `ids` and `organizationId` are provided, the query applies BOTH as simultaneous conditions (not one or the other)
checklist.name: Both filters as AND conditions

checklist.description: The `list` method does NOT use if/else-if (or equivalent) logic that causes the organizationId condition to be skipped when `ids` is provided
checklist.name: No if/else-if branching on filter params

checklist.description: When `organizationId` is provided, it is always added to the query as a WHERE condition regardless of whether `ids` is also provided
checklist.name: organizationId always applied

checklist.description: When `ids` is provided and non-empty, an `inArray` (or equivalent) condition is applied to filter by the given IDs
checklist.name: ids filter applied when provided

checklist.description: The `security-notes.md` explains that skipping the tenant scope when an ID list is provided can allow cross-tenant data leakage
checklist.name: Security notes explain the risk

checklist.description: Repository is implemented as a factory function, not a class
checklist.name: Factory function pattern

checklist.description: The implementation handles the case where `ids` is an empty array safely (either returns empty result or skips the inArray condition)
checklist.name: Empty ids handled safely

context: Tests whether the agent implements a repository list method that correctly applies both an ID list filter AND a tenant scope filter as AND conditions, avoiding the dangerous if/else-if pattern that allows one branch to silently skip the tenant check.
